Tesla stock slammed as company announces plan to issue up to $2 billion in new shares
By Ciara Linnane
Published: Feb 13, 2020 7:52 a.m. ET

93
Tesla Inc. shares TSLA, -1.73% slid 5.8% in premarket trades Thursday, after the electric-car maker said it is planning to offer about $2 billion of common stock in an underwritten deal. The company said Chief Executive Elon Musk will participate in the offering by purchasing up to $10 million in new shares. Board member Larry Ellison will also participate by buying up to $1 million in stock. Proceeds of the deal are slated to be used to bolster the company's balance sheet and for general corporate purposes. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are underwriting the deal and have a 30-day option to acquire another $300 million in stock. Shares have gained 149% in the last 12 months, while the S&P 500 SPX, -0.36% has gained 23%. Read all of MarketWatch's recent coverage of Tesla and CEO Elon Musk.

才說不缺錢！特斯拉宣布發行 20 億美元普通股

特斯拉執行長馬斯克 (Elon Musk) 一月底信誓旦旦表示，手頭現金無虞，沒有融資必要，未料，不到幾週後，特斯拉宣布計畫發行 20 億美元普通股。

特斯拉週四 (13 日) 宣布計畫發行 20 億美元普通股，計劃將募集的資金進一步加強其資產負債表，以及用於一般公司用途。

特斯拉週四 (13 日) 宣布計畫發行 20 億美元普通股，而執行長馬斯克 (Elon Musk) 將參與認股，最多認購 1000 萬美元的股票，董事會成員埃里森 (Larry Ellison) 也將購買高達 100 萬美元的股票。

InsiderScore 網站曾統計，馬斯克歷來只要買進特斯拉持股，特斯拉股價在接下來 3 個月內平均漲幅達 41%，被視為可靠的短期買進訊號。
受此消息激勵，特斯拉 (TSLA-US) 週四股價上漲 6% 至盤中高點，收漲 4.78% 至每股 804 美元。在過去三個月和六個月中，特斯拉股價分別上漲了約 120% 和 225%。本月初，特斯拉股價曾達到每股 968.99 美元。

上月底特斯拉發布最新財報後，特斯拉執行長馬斯克曾明確提到，儘管該公司股價飛漲，但沒有籌集資金的計劃。

馬斯克稱：「我們不會人為地阻礙自身進步。儘管如此，籌集資金沒有任何意義，因為企業成長有如此增長，我們希望仍能產生現金。」

馬斯克定位將中國市場成特斯拉今年發展重心，但武漢肺炎疫情攪局，上海超級工廠 Model 3 產能與交車恐將推遲。

Wedbush 分析師 Dan Ives 對特斯拉此舉表示讚賞：「這是一個明智的戰略舉措。它消除了現金短缺的任何末日場景。」

阿里Q3財季營收、月活躍用戶超預期 阿里雲營收首破人民幣100億元

週四 (13 日) 阿里巴巴 (BABA-US) 於美股盤前公布 2020 會計年度 Q3 財報 (2019 年 10 月至 12 月)，本財季營收和月活躍移動用戶高於市場預期，阿里雲業務營收更首次突破人民幣 100 億元。

不過因武漢肺炎疫情對阿里的影響數仍未明，阿里巴巴盤前跌幅逾 3%。

Q4 財季財報關鍵數據：

營收報人民幣 1615 億元，年增 38%，高於市場預期的人民幣 1592 億元
月活躍移動用戶為 8.24 億人，較上財季增加 3900 萬人，高於市場預期的 8.1 億人
阿里雲業務營收報人民幣 107 億元，年增 62%
Q4 財季基於 non GAAP 財報關鍵數據：

調整後 EBITDA 報人民幣 559 億元，年增 37%
調整後每股 ADS 純益報人民幣 18.19 元，年增 49%
稀釋後每股 EPS 報人民幣 2.27 元，年增 49%



根據財報，在 Q3 財季，阿里巴巴旗下淘寶直播產生的成交金額 (GMV)，以及觀看淘寶直播的月活躍用戶數均年增成長超過 100%；天貓線上實物商品 GMV 不含未付訂單的年增率達 24%，其中快速消費品 (FMCG) 和消費電子產品皆呈強勁增長；透過支付寶在零售和消費者服務平台上的成交金額達到人民幣 2684 億元，年增率達 26%。

公司展望：
展望未來，阿里巴巴集團財務長武衛稱，集團將持續致力於數位基礎設施和服務方面的投資，為阿里巴巴數位經濟的合作夥伴提供更多支持。

關於近期延燒的武漢肺炎疫情，阿里巴巴並未說明疫情對其業務的影響。

首席執行長張勇僅表示：「我們動員阿里巴巴生態系統中強大的商業和技術，全力對抗疫情的爆發，並確保社會日常必需品供應充足，緩解措施。」

Federal Judge Halts Pentagon Cloud Contract, in Win for Amazon


A federal judge ordered the Pentagon to halt work on the massive JEDI cloud-computing contract, handing Amazon. com Inc. an early win in its efforts to overturn the award to rival Microsoft Corp.

Judge Patricia Campbell-Smith of the U.S. Court of Federal Claims issued the preliminary injunction on Thursday to block the Pentagon from proceeding with the contract, “until further order of the court,” according to a court docket entry. The judge’s order itself remains sealed temporarily.


Amazon’s cloud unit, AWS, was long considered the favorite to win the Joint Enterprise Defense Infrastructure, or JEDI, contract, which is valued at as much as $10 billion over the next decade. The company’s bid was clouded by conflict-of-interest allegations , however, which are still under investigation by the Pentagon’s inspector general.

Amazon filed suit to block the contract award in December, contending that the Pentagon’s choice of Microsoft was improperly influenced by President Trump ’s public complaints about Amazon.

Mr. Trump has blamed Amazon founder Jeff Bezos for unfavorable coverage of his administration in the Washington Post, which Mr. Bezos bought in 2013. The Post says its editorial decisions are independent.

Amazon recently has sought to depose Mr. Trump as well as other administration officials over their actions.


Amazon said in its motion that Mr. Trump “made crystal clear—both to the public at large, and by clear implication to senior [Pentagon] officials (including his political appointees)—that he did not want his administration to award the contract to [Amazon].”

Amazon said in a recent statement that Mr. Trump “has repeatedly demonstrated his willingness to use his position as president and commander in chief to interfere with government functions—including federal procurements—to advance his personal agenda.”

The Defense Department is fighting the case. It has said it “remains confident in the JEDI award. Our team’s duty and sole focus must remain on equipping our warfighters for an increasingly complex and challenging battlefield environment.”


The Pentagon previously has said the “selection decision was made by an expert team of career public servants and military officers from across the Department of Defense and in accordance with DOD’s normal source-selection process.”

In a statement, Microsoft said it was confident it would ultimately prevail and retain the contract.

“While we are disappointed with the additional delay, we believe that we will ultimately be able to move forward with the work to make sure those who serve our country can access the new technology they urgently require,” said the statement from Frank X. Shaw, corporate vice president of communications for Microsoft.
